title: TikTok EU-China data transfers should be allowed during appeal, Irish Supreme court confirms
summary: TikTok can continue transferring data from the EU to China. This decision comes as the company appeals a regulator's order to stop these transfers. The Irish Supreme Court has allowed the transfers to proceed during the appeal process. The regulator had previously fined TikTok over privacy concerns.
